item.title: FAQ
item.description:
Frequently Asked Questions

When and where is CND Poland 2026?
The conference is planned for autumn 2026. Exact date and venue will be announced soon.
How much does a ticket cost?
Ticket pricing will be announced soon. Follow us for early-bird offers.
Is there a virtual attendance option?
We are focused on an in-person experience. Sessions may be recorded and published after the event.
Can I submit a talk?
Yes! The Call for Papers is now open. Submit your talk on Sessionize — the CFP closes on June 1, 2026. See the CFP section for topics and submission guidelines.
How can I become a sponsor?
We'd love to hear from you. Download our 2026 sponsorship prospectus (PDF), visit our Contact page, or email the organizing team.
Is there a Code of Conduct?
Yes. Please read our Code of Conduct. We are committed to providing a safe and welcoming environment for everyone.
Will there be food and drinks?
Yes, lunch and refreshments will be provided for all attendees.

item.title: Team
item.description:
Meet the team behind Cloud Native Day Poland 2026. We are a passionate group of cloud native practitioners, community leaders, and conference veterans with over a decade of cumulative experience organizing in-person conferences and meetups across Poland and beyond.

Our team brings together CNCF Ambassadors, Docker Captains, Java Champions, and seasoned architects who live and breathe cloud native technologies every day. United by a shared mission to grow the cloud native ecosystem in Poland, we work to create an event that delivers real technical depth, fosters meaningful connections, and welcomes everyone — from first-time attendees to industry experts.
